metadata.description: Growth in the Dutch economy is slowing and the economic indicators have worsened. The TMT sector is affected, but continues to perform relatively well.

[State of TMT (20 December 2019). 1 MB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Stand-van-TMT-december-2019_tcm16-66562.pdf)
Economic climate. The economic climate is deteriorating in the Netherlands. The purchasing managers’ index (PMI), producer confidence and consumer confidence have declined in recent quarters. Even so, entrepreneurs in the TMT sector are relatively positive compared with business as a whole.

text: Staff shortage. What is affecting the TMT sector is a shortage of staff.

metadata.tags: Stand van Sectoren, Technologie, Media & Telecom
metadata.author: Kasper Buiting
metadata.description: Growth in the Dutch economy is slowing and the economic indicators have worsened. The TMT sector is affected, but continues to perform relatively well.
metadata.parent_text: Staff shortage. What is affecting the TMT sector is a shortage of staff. No fewer than 33% of TMT entrepreneurs say they cannot obtain the required workforce. The shortage is particularly acute in IT. There, 41% of entrepreneurs struggle to find suitable staff.
